cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, Jaspreet ji, this is Rohan from Excel Consulting. We came across your profile on LinkedIn and were impressed with your experience in IT.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Ah, Hello Rohan. Which area of my profile were you looking at? I get many calls like this, sir.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: We're looking for candidates with your skill set for one of our clients. They're a leading firm in the industry and we think you'd be a great fit. Can I discuss the role with you, Jaspreet?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Thik hai, please go ahead. But before that, can you tell me more about your company and how you found me?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Certainly, sir. Excel Consulting is a reputable firm with over a decade of experience in recruitment. We found your profile through a LinkedIn search, focusing on IT professionals with experience in project management.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, that sounds good. Now, tell me about this role. What's the client like and what are they looking for?

slow_thinking_rationale: At 93s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: A recruiter from a legitimate consulting firm calls a candidate whose profile they found on LinkedIn. They discuss the candidate's experience and interest in a specific role with one of their clients.
